title: cc-wake snapshot
description: What a Collector produces and the Web UI renders. One flat list of the local Claude Code sessions, plus a timestamp so viewers can tell how fresh it is.

ts.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this snapshot was produced.

state.description: working = a task is running; waiting = blocked on input/permission; idle = at rest.

rc_url.description: If the session is remotely controllable (bridged to the web), the URL to reach it; else null.

focusable.description: Whether a Driver on this host can bring the session's window/tab to the front.

started.description: Unix epoch ms the session started.

updated.description: Unix epoch ms of last activity.
